ModMetaData.name: VRE Waster (HSK Patched)
ModMetaData.author: Oskar Potocki, Sarg Bjornson — HSK patch by CarbineAction
ModMetaData.description:
HSK-patched standalone version of Vanilla Races Expanded — Waster, tuned for the Hardcore SK modpack.
This bundles the upstream VRE Waster mod content with HSK conventions baked in. Do NOT enable the Steam Workshop version of VRE Waster alongside this — they would duplicate each other's defs.
HSK building rewrite (1 building): - VRE_BurnBarrel rewritten with full HSK pattern: stuffCategories RuggedMetallic + costStuffCount 45 + ComponentIndustrial 1 (HSK convention for outdoor/weather-exposed metal fixtures, with a single fab component for the sealed combustion barrel — sits at the bottom of the pollution-tier compared to HSK's WastepackAtomizer high-tech atomizer)
No CE work needed. Waster's 17 pollution-themed genes (ToxAbsorption, PollutionRage, PollutionRegeneration, PollutionCognition, PollutionSustenance, PollutionAccuracy, etc.) and 11 pollution stimulus hediffs are pure stat-based mechanics — no tools, verbs, armor offsets, weapons, or apparel. Combat strength comes from vanilla mechanics + pollution interactions, not custom melee.
Original mod by Oskar Potocki, Sarg Bjornson. HSK patch and bundling by CarbineAction.
Required: Hardcore SK, Combat Extended, Vanilla Expanded Framework, Biotech DLC.
